creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-01-10 21:11:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/p5-Net-TiVo      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Net::TiVo provides an object-oriented interface to TiVo's REST interface.  This
  makes it possible to query your TiVo for information about recorded content,
  such as a show's download URL, and space consumed.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-TiVo/
  Author: Christopher Boumenot <boumenot@gmail.com>
  
  PR:             ports/107752
  Submitted by:   Christopher Boumenot <boumenot at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1798    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/net/p5-Net-TiVo/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-TiVo/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-TiVo/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-TiVo/pkg-plist (new)
